description: Style NoteNow give your casual wear a twist of style with this pair of sandals from red chief. Wear them with your off-duty ensembles.Product DetailsBlack sandals with thick forefoot and midfoot straps and a toe separatorSoft and foamy footbedOutsole adhered to the upper for durabilityTPU outsole with textured grooves and an upraised heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
